lean_tactics:
have t1 : a = c := by exact Eq.trans h1 h2
  have t2 : a = d := by exact Eq.trans t1 h3
  have t3 : a = e := by exact Eq.trans t2 h4
  exact t3

induction n with
  | zero =>
      rfl
  | succ n ih =>
      have h0 : s (Nat.succ n) = s n + (n + n + 1) := by rfl
      rw [h0, ih]
      rw [Nat.mul_add]
      rw [Nat.add_mul]
      rw [Nat.one_mul, Nat.mul_one]
      simp [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
